name: Milton Jones
bio: Milton Jones is an English comedian celebrated for surreal one-liners and puns delivered in a deadpan, slightly neurotic style, kept consistently family-friendly. He won the Perrier Best Newcomer Award in 1996 and has written and performed many of his own radio series for BBC Radio 4. He is a recurring guest on panel shows such as Mock the Week.

timeline.ev: Wins the Perrier Best Newcomer Award
Another Case of Milton Jones wins Sony Radio silver
On the Road tour and DVD

accolades: Sony Radio Academy Award, silver for Best Comedy (2012)
New York Festival Silver Award for Best Comedy Programme

specials.t: The Universe Tour Part One - Earth
